visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting family or friends. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting family or friends. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Visiting Family and Friends]
Please Note:
There is a service charge of Schengen application with bio 46 AZN, Schengen application without bio 44 AZN, Long term application 49 AZN (Inclusive of 18% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees 
Payment for all optional services must be made in cash or by card in AZN.

## Documents Required

Family & Friends Visit Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3FpHHF7mKfkvvLMW5nEpdk/c3ec68c95f4ca00c0f06cff36d75e4f8/Private-Visit-Visa-Checklist.pdf) 

Note: Also please check - Annex III (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6bKLiKo92B67N4iiQ3O8w/edc2b74516c8a23fbcf9d84ed891fa84/EN-annexe-acte-autonome-cp-part1-New.pdf) (List of  supporting documents to be submitted by customers  for short stay visas in  Azerbaijan)

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45 mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
Please apply at least 2 weeks in advance and note that visa processing takes up to 15 days. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than Baku will take another two days
                                                                    due to postal delivery.
Please call our Helpline or write email to our Email ID (mailto:info.lvaz@vfshelpline.com) for getting appointment to VFS Global Latvia Visa Application Center.

## Download Forms
- Online Application Form (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx)

visa_types.name: Work Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Employment Long Stay Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/dkPhfFZVYv4H1ucIvz3d5/3e31f723e31f299b4c1f9636c0a1d79b/employment-long-stay-visa-checklist.pdf)
If you want to apply for work type visa you need the documents below 
- Invitation letter
- Passport+ copy of passport and all used pages
- 1 photo, on white background, 70% should be covered by the face; photo should be attached to the application form itself
- E-Visa application form for Latvian National Visa D filled in on our web-site, printed out and signed in relevant boxes of the application form which are marked by “signature” note. Visa application form is available on the web-site 
https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EServiceWebSite/ApplicationInquiry.aspx (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx)
- Health insurance for the period of 90 days from the date of arrival to Latvia, insurance coverage amount should be not less than 42 600 €;
- Cору of ticket booking;
- Accommodation where you will stay in Latvia
- Bank account statement not less than 740 EUR. In case another person is paying for your trip – his/her financial documents;
- Work agreement
- Statements from your old working place
- Other documents as certificate , statements about working places and etc)
- Visa fee is 90 Euro
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Work Visa]

Please Note:
There is a service charge of 49 AZN (Inclusive of 18% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
All Visa Fee are to be paid in cash only in Euro.
All optional services are to be paid by card/in cash only in AZN.
visa_types.processing_time:
Please apply at least 2 weeks in advance and note that visa processing takes up to 60 days. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than Baku will take another two days due to postal
                                                        delivery.
                                                    
 Please call our Helpline or write email to our Email ID (mailto:info.lvaz@vfshelpline.com) for getting appointment to VFS Global Latvia Visa Application Center.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you intend to work in Latvia for more than 90 days, or you need to apply for a work visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you intend to work in Latvia for more than 90 days, or you need to apply for a work visa.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Work Visa]

Please Note:
There is a service charge of 49 AZN (Inclusive of 18% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
All Visa Fee are to be paid in cash only in Euro.
All optional services are to be paid by card/in cash only in AZN.

## Documents Required
Employment Long Stay Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/dkPhfFZVYv4H1ucIvz3d5/3e31f723e31f299b4c1f9636c0a1d79b/employment-long-stay-visa-checklist.pdf)
If you want to apply for work type visa you need the documents below 
- Invitation letter
- Passport+ copy of passport and all used pages
- 1 photo, on white background, 70% should be covered by the face; photo should be attached to the application form itself
- E-Visa application form for Latvian National Visa D filled in on our web-site, printed out and signed in relevant boxes of the application form which are marked by “signature” note. Visa application form is available on the web-site 
https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EServiceWebSite/ApplicationInquiry.aspx (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx)
- Health insurance for the period of 90 days from the date of arrival to Latvia, insurance coverage amount should be not less than 42 600 €;
- Cору of ticket booking;
- Accommodation where you will stay in Latvia
- Bank account statement not less than 740 EUR. In case another person is paying for your trip – his/her financial documents;
- Work agreement
- Statements from your old working place
- Other documents as certificate , statements about working places and etc)
- Visa fee is 90 Euro

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45 mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
Please apply at least 2 weeks in advance and note that visa processing takes up to 60 days. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than Baku will take another two days due to postal
                                                        delivery.
                                                    
 Please call our Helpline or write email to our Email ID (mailto:info.lvaz@vfshelpline.com) for getting appointment to VFS Global Latvia Visa Application Center.

## Download Forms
Please click here (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/).

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Latvian business visa is granted to foreign nationals to discuss with business representatives, participate in a scientific, educational, professional, or company meeting or conference, work
                                                                    out an estate or negotiate an agreement in Latvia.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Latvian business visa is granted to foreign nationals to discuss with business representatives, participate in a scientific, educational, professional, or company meeting or conference, work
                                                                    out an estate or negotiate an agreement in Latvia.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business]
Please Note:
There is a service charge of Schengen application with bio 46 AZN, Schengen application without bio 44 AZN, Long term application 49 AZN (Inclusive of 18% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
Payment for all optional services must be made in cash or by card in AZN.

## Documents Required

Business Visa Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4rRvxXw97RdQdGG36Mdagj/d28ae68dde3d02198ca86bb7ed98313c/Business-Visit-EN-New.pdf)
Seamans Visa Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/wETifyBZW11zEzn3QAcdA/4329feb305ea81f4f61bbb38fe31b29e/seaman-checklist.pdf)
IRC Visa Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7fsarf5LcMAx2YBO2vLNch/665b0a3e6b644545853362b3253cd48e/irc-visa-checklist.pdf) 

Note: Also please check - Annex III (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6bKLiKo92B67N4iiQ3O8w/edc2b74516c8a23fbcf9d84ed891fa84/EN-annexe-acte-autonome-cp-part1-New.pdf) (List of supporting documents to be submitted by customers  for short stay visas in Azerbaijan)

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45 mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
Please apply at least 2 weeks in advance and note that visa processing takes up to 15 days. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than Baku will take another two
                                                                        days due to postal delivery.
Please call our Helpline or write email to our Email ID (mailto:info.lvaz@vfshelpline.com) for getting appointment to VFS Global Latvia Visa Application Center.

## Download Forms
- Online Application Form (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Latvian student visa is usually issued to undertake a course in Latvia. Study visas usually are non-permanent visas which enable individuals to go to Latvia for a given timeframe to undertake a course
                                                            at a Latvian academic institution.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Latvian student visa is usually issued to undertake a course in Latvia. Study visas usually are non-permanent visas which enable individuals to go to Latvia for a given timeframe to undertake a course
                                                            at a Latvian academic institution.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Erasmus or other training or EU research programmes]
Please Note:
There is a service charge of Schengen application with bio 46 AZN, Schengen application without bio 44 AZN, Long term application 49 AZN (Inclusive of 18% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
Payment for all optional services must be made in cash or by card in AZN.
 

## Documents Required

Study Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3rmmWe9i8Y9SR1B9QVQsGI/934585a79cfabb7ae6ba5cc127dbd829/Study-Checklist.pdf) 
Note: Also please check - Annex III (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6bKLiKo92B67N4iiQ3O8w/edc2b74516c8a23fbcf9d84ed891fa84/EN-annexe-acte-autonome-cp-part1-New.pdf) (List of  supporting documents to be submitted by customers  for short stay visas in  Azerbaijan)

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45 mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
Please apply at least 2 weeks in advance and note that visa processing takes up to 15 days. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than Baku will take another two days due to
                                                            postal delivery.
Please call our Helpline or write email to our Email ID (mailto:info.lvaz@vfshelpline.com) for getting appointment to VFS Global Latvia Visa Application Center.

## Download Forms
- Online Application Form (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Latvian Tourist visa issued for those going to Latvia for holidays, tourism or entertainment in Latvia. If you are a Latvian citizen, you do not have to submit an application for a Latvian visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Latvian Tourist visa issued for those going to Latvia for holidays, tourism or entertainment in Latvia. If you are a Latvian citizen, you do not have to submit an application for a Latvian visa. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Tourist ]
Please Note:
There is a service charge of Schengen application with bio 46 AZN, Schengen application without bio 44 AZN, Long term application 49 AZN (Inclusive of 18% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees
Payment for all optional services must be made in cash or by card in AZN.

## Documents Required

Tourist Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/403haKiSV2GMIelGdaqezv/06d9eba5e0199ab48ea2412c62e55d78/Tourist-Visa-Checklist.pdf) 
Note: Also please check - Annex III (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6bKLiKo92B67N4iiQ3O8w/edc2b74516c8a23fbcf9d84ed891fa84/EN-annexe-acte-autonome-cp-part1-New.pdf) (List of  supporting documents to be submitted by customers  for short stay visas in  Azerbaijan)

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45 mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
Please apply at least 2 weeks in advance and note that visa processing takes up to 15 days. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than Baku will take another two days
                                                                    due to postal delivery.
Please call our Helpline or write email to our Email ID (mailto:info.lvaz@vfshelpline.com) for getting appointment to VFS Global Latvia Visa Application Center.

## Download Forms
- Online Application Form (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you intend to study in Latvia for more than 90 days you need to apply for a study visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you intend to study in Latvia for more than 90 days you need to apply for a study visa.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Study Visa]

Please Note:
There is a service charge of 49 AZN (Inclusive of 18% VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees

All Visa Fee are to be paid in cash only in Euro.
All optional services are to be paid by card/in cash only in AZN.

## Documents Required
Study Long Stay Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7e2ZuwJcS7JWdQK8fTcreg/6f534c798b276b63d9ee786006ab1989/study-long-stay-visa-checklist.pdf)
If you want to apply for work type visa you need the documents below
- Passport;
- Invitation letter issued by OCMA (
www.pmlp.gov.lv (http://www.pmlp.gov.lv/))
- 2 photos, on white background, 70% should be covered by the face; 1 photo should be attached to the application form itself, the 2nd photo should be submitted separately along with your application;
- E-Visa application form for Latvian National Visa D filled in on our web-site, printed out and signed in relevant boxes of the application form which are marked by “signature” note. Visa application form is available on the web-sitehttps://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationInquiry.aspx (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationInquiry.aspx);
- Health insurance for the period of 90 days from the date of arrival to Latvia, insurance coverage amount should be not less than 42 600 €;
- Cору of ticket booking;
- A written confirmation from University regarding the matriculation of the student;
- A document from University about the envisaged place of residence;
- Study contract;
- Bank account statement for the last three months; minimum account balance for studies is 8880 EUR. In case another person is paying for your studies – his/her financial documents;
- Other certificates and supporting documents you deem relevant (e.g. work experience certificate, IELTS diploma etc.).

## Photo Specifications
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-45 mm in width
- Taken against a light background
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- No glasses

## Processing Time
Please apply at least 2 weeks in advance and note that visa processing takes up to 60 days. Please note that applications submitted to other VFS-offices than Baku will take another two days due to postal
                                                        delivery.
                                                    
 Please call our Helpline or write email to our Email ID (mailto:info.lvaz@vfshelpline.com) for getting appointment to VFS Global Latvia Visa Application Center.

## Download Forms
Please click here (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/).
